title: De-slop this AI-written executive summary paragraph
guidance: Reward human, specific prose with every figure preserved. Penalise any version that leaves AI tells or alters a number.

runner_input.instruction: Rewrite the paragraph to remove AI tells while keeping all facts intact.
runner_input.constraints: Keep every number. At most one em-dash. No 'delve', 'tapestry', 'landscape', or 'not X, it's Y' constructions.

source_blocks.text: It's worth noting that Halden represents a truly remarkable tapestry of opportunity in the ever-evolving landscape of food-safety compliance. This isn't just a software business — it's a institutionally-bestowed moat. As we delve deeper into the numbers, the £11.2m ARR and 112% NRR quietly underscore a fundamentally robust foundation. Despite its challenges, the company stands as a testament to durable, compliance-driven demand. In conclusion, the opportunity is clear.

rubric_notes: £11.2m ARR and 112% NRR must survive unchanged.
The 'this isn't just X — it's Y', 'tapestry', 'landscape', 'delve', 'quietly', 'testament', 'Despite its challenges', 'In conclusion' are all tells to cut.
A good rewrite is shorter and concrete, not just reworded.
